name: ai-tally-extension
description: Track AI usage across Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini & more. Hit a limit? Switch instantly with your full conversation.

scripts.zip:chrome: zip -r ai-tally-chrome.zip manifest.json popup.html popup.css popup.js background.js content.js icons/
scripts.zip:firefox: zip -r ai-tally-firefox.zip manifest.json popup.html popup.css popup.js background.js content.js icons/
scripts.dev: echo 'Load the extension folder directly in Chrome — no build step needed!'

author: Your Name
